rationale: Both correctly validate the delegated-vs-direct loader design and both independently find the uncovered hunyuan_image3_transformer.py caller of the removed get_cache_scale API, satisfying the latent gap check with concrete file/line evidence. X is more precise and higher-signal: its test-adequacy critique (fake param not proving real AutoWeightsLoader mapping) closely echoes the human reviewer's actual concern about unverified real-checkpoint resolution, and its findings are prioritized by severity. Y raises the same core gap but buries it under several low-value stylistic nits (add explanatory comments, add branch-coverage test) that aren't grounded in any reviewer concern, diluting precision and actionability despite Y's methodologically rigorous PR-time-tree framing.
